title: Welcome to My New Blog

Here is the actual content of my first blog post!
You can use all standard markdown, insert images, and write LaTeX equations just like you do on the rest of your website.

title: An Infinite Hazelnut Tree: a Mathematical Blog
text:
The \(E_6\) Dynkin diagram - illustrated by Emily Windes


The namesake of the blog comes from Grothendieck’s famous quote from Récoltes et Semailles, where he likened the art of mathematical problem solving to trying to crack open a hard nut. In this blog, you will find a random assortment of nuts that currently interest me, that is articles about mathematical ideas and problems I find interesting and topics I am currently trying to learn.
